summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DivineCo cookie business system including customer storefront, admin dashboard, and backend APIs. System is 95% functional with excellent backend performance and minor frontend overlay issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Overlay interception prevents normal click on 'Place Order' button
ui_bugs.workaround: Force click bypasses the issue, order placement still works

passed_tests: All 15 backend API endpoints working correctly
Customer storefront loads with correct Navy Blue/White theme
All 6 cookie products display with correct pricing (₱45/₱260)
Add to cart functionality for both piece and box options
Cart quantity adjustment and total calculation
Admin dashboard sales summary (2 orders, ₱700 revenue, White Matcha best seller)
Inventory tracking shows correct counts for all 6 flavors
Order management table displays complete order details
Real-time inventory updates after order placement
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix checkout modal overlay z-index issue to prevent button click interception. The overlay from the cart sheet is interfering with the checkout modal's 'Place Order' button click events.
